summary: IT Support & Network Specialist with 5+ years of experience in IT operations, networking, and end-user support, including 4+ years in enterprise IT environments. Skilled in troubleshooting hardware, software, and connectivity issues, managing routers, switches, firewalls, and administering VMware environments (ESXi, vCenter, backups). Adept in Active Directory, with a strong focus on infrastructure reliability, customer support, and technical documentation.

bullets: Managed enterprise network infrastructure including routers, switches, and firewalls
Administered VMware environments (ESXi, vCenter) and implemented backup solutions
Provided IT support for 200+ users, troubleshooting hardware and software issues
Configured and maintained Active Directory for user authentication and permissions
Delivered end-user technical support for desktops, laptops, and peripherals
Assisted in network setup and connectivity troubleshooting
Documented IT processes and maintained inventory of hardware assets
Participated in system migrations and software deployments

name: Mahdi HAMIDI
title: Network specialist

projects.title: Enterprise Network Redesign
projects.description: Led the redesign and implementation of a secure network infrastructure for a 500-employee company, improving performance by 40% and reducing downtime.

projects.title: VMware Migration Project
projects.description: Migrated legacy servers to a VMware ESXi environment, consolidating resources and enhancing backup capabilities.
